defects.required_class: Invented failure token or state literal
defects.rubric_evidence: A consumer invents a failure token, state, event type, or field that no producer owns.
defects.required_fix: cite the producer-owned catalog or add the token to the owning context before consumers use it

expected_suggestion.gate_ref: DDD review rubric: A consumer invents a failure token, state, event type, or field that no producer owns.

defects.rubric_evidence: A context has dependencies but no owns/reads/does-not-own statement.
defects.required_fix: add owns/reads/does-not-own and route cross-context policy through a public surface

expected_suggestion.gate_ref: DDD review rubric: A context has dependencies but no owns/reads/does-not-own statement.

defects.required_class: Public API promised but not exposed
defects.rubric_evidence: A public API is promised in prose but no public export/import surface or import test is named.
defects.required_fix: name the public surface and add an import proof or manual exposure checklist

expected_suggestion.gate_ref: DDD review rubric: A public API is promised in prose but no public export/import surface or import test is named.

defects.rubric_evidence: A relational predicate names only one operand or uses a category instead of declared fields/events.
defects.required_fix: name both operands as declared fields, events, projections, or resolver outputs

expected_suggestion.gate_ref: DDD review rubric: A relational predicate names only one operand or uses a category instead of declared fields/events.

defects.required_class: Vacuous enforcement rule without a seeded violation
defects.rubric_evidence: An enforcement rule has no seeded violation or standing gate.
defects.required_fix: add a seeded violation fixture and run the architecture gate to show the expected failure

expected_suggestion.gate_ref: DDD review rubric: An enforcement rule has no seeded violation or standing gate.
